provenance.source_corpus: Nitrogen recovery in planted seedlings, competing vegetation, and soil in response to fertilization on a boreal mine reclamation site

source_spans.text: Seedlings that had received CRF out-performing unfertilized seedlings
seedlings that received IAF
first season diameter growth
first season final diameter
Average organ biomass of seedlings that had received CRF increased significantly
Both CRF and IAF treatments resulted in similar increases in foliar and root N concentrations
Total foliar N content of both CRF and IAF seedlings exceeded that of the unfertilized seedlings
N content of the roots of CRF seedlings exceeded that observed in roots of unfertilized control seedlings
Occurrence (i.e. % cover) and dry mass of competing vegetation surrounding seedlings were unaffected by seedling species or fertilizer treatment
Occurrence (i.e. % cover) and dry mass of competing vegetation surrounding seedlings were unaffected by seedling species or fertilizer treatment
much greater proportion of applied 15N being recovered from the IAF treatment
